title: Prompting as a New Creative Skill
concept: Effective prompting has become its own skill, blending clear communication with an understanding of how these models interpret language. Boss explain ends with: 'Next up: Inpainting and Outpainting.'

exercises.prompt: When you ask an AI to make a picture, what helps you get the BEST result?

options.text: Not telling the AI anything at all

exercises.explain: The clearer and more detailed your instructions, the better the AI understands what you want!

cards.title: Words Are Your Superpower
cards.body: Did you know that typing the RIGHT words can turn you into an AI artist, writer, or problem-solver? The secret isn't magic — it's a skill called prompting, and anyone can learn it!

cards.title: What Is Prompting?
cards.body: Prompting means writing instructions or questions for an AI so it understands exactly what you want. Good prompting mixes clear communication with knowing how AI 'thinks' about words, so you can guide it toward great results.

cards.title: Like Ordering at a Restaurant
cards.body: Imagine telling a chef 'make me food' versus 'I'd like a cheese pizza with a thin crust and extra basil.' The second order gets you exactly what you want! Prompting an AI works the same way — specific requests lead to better results.

cards.title: Vague vs. Great Prompt
cards.body: Vague: 'Draw a dog.' You might get any random dog. Great: 'Draw a fluffy golden retriever puppy playing in a sunny park, cartoon style.' Now the AI knows the breed, mood, setting, and art style — much better results!

cards.title: Myth: Prompting Isn't a Real Skill
cards.body: Myth: 'Typing words into a box isn't really a skill.' Truth: Prompting is a real, valuable skill! It combines clear thinking, good communication, and understanding how AI interprets language — just like learning to write clearly or ask good questions.

cards.title: Weak Prompt vs. Strong Prompt
cards.body: The difference between a weak and strong prompt is all about detail and clarity!

left.text: 'Make a picture.' Too vague — AI has to guess everything, so results are random and unpredictable.

right.text: 'Make a picture of a red dragon flying over snowy mountains at sunset, in watercolor style.' Clear and specific — AI knows exactly what to create.

exercises.prompt: Which of these is the BEST example of good prompting?

options.text: 'A cozy cabin in the woods during autumn, digital painting style, warm lighting'

exercises.explain: The best prompt gives clear details about the subject, setting, style, and mood — that's what makes prompting a real skill!

exercises.prompt: True or False: Prompting is just typing random words and hoping for the best.
exercises.explain: False! Good prompting requires clear communication and understanding how AI interprets your words — it's a real, learnable skill.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the sentence.
exercises.sentence: Good prompting combines clear communication with understanding how AI ___ language.
exercises.explain: AI models 'interpret' or understand your words in their own way, so learning how they read prompts helps you write better ones.

exercises.prompt: Spot the AI: Which of these three images was most likely created using a vague, unclear prompt?

options.text: A random, blurry image with mismatched objects and no clear subject
A sharp, detailed image of a specific scene with clear style and mood
An image that closely matches a detailed description given to the AI

exercises.explain: Vague prompts often lead to confused, unpredictable results since the AI has to guess what you meant!

exercises.prompt: Why has prompting become known as its own creative skill?

options.text: Because it requires memorizing secret computer code
Because it blends clear communication with understanding how AI models interpret language
Because only professional artists are allowed to do it
Because it has nothing to do with how AI actually works

exercises.explain: Exactly! Prompting is a skill because it mixes clear communication with knowing how AI reads and responds to language — the better you get at both, the better your results. Next up: Inpainting and Outpainting.
